<!doctype html><html lang="zh-Hant"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><title>3D 進階棋盤方向任務遊戲</title><style id="appStyle"></style></head><body><div id="game"></div><section id="hud" class="glass"><div id="stats"><span class="pill" id="levelPill">第 1 關</span><span class="pill" id="sizePill">4 × 4</span><span class="pill" id="scorePill">分數 0</span></div><div id="mission">由起點前往 <b>學校</b></div><div id="stepText">下一站：學校</div><div id="route"></div></section><div id="weatherLabel">🌤️ 晴朗城市</div><div id="compassDock"><div id="compass"><div id="needle"></div><div id="hub"></div><div id="nMark">N</div></div><button id="hintBtn" class="glass">🧭 導航提示</button></div><div id="pad"><button class="dir" data-i="7">西北方</button><button class="dir" data-i="0">北方</button><button class="dir" data-i="1">東北方</button><button class="dir" data-i="6">西方</button><div class="center">🧍</div><button class="dir" data-i="2">東方</button><button class="dir" data-i="5">西南方</button><button class="dir" data-i="4">南方</button><button class="dir" data-i="3">東南方</button></div><div id="miniPanel" class="glass"><h3>地圖圖例</h3><div class="legendRow"><i class="dot target"></i>目前任務景點</div><div class="legendRow"><i class="dot landmark"></i>其他景點</div><div class="legendRow"><i class="dot block"></i>陷阱（踩中後重來）</div></div><div id="zoomControls"><button class="zoomBtn" id="zoomIn" aria-label="放大">＋</button><button class="zoomBtn" id="zoomOut" aria-label="縮小">−</button><button class="zoomBtn" id="zoomReset" aria-label="重設縮放">↺</button></div><div id="zoomTip">雙指縮放棋盤</div><div id="toast"></div><div id="overlay"><div class="card"><button class="close" id="closeHint">×</button><h2>八方向導航提示</h2><p id="hintText">下一步應向北方前進。</p><div id="bigCompass"></div></div></div><div id="intro" class="open"><div class="card"><h1>🏙️ 3D 棋盤方向任務</h1><p>先選擇你想控制的角色，再依照任務次序前往不同景點。</p><div class="avatarPicker"><button class="avatarChoice selected" data-avatar="boy"><span class="avatarHead">👦</span>男同學<small>藍色校服角色</small></button><button class="avatarChoice" data-avatar="girl"><span class="avatarHead">👧</span>女同學<small>粉紅色校服角色</small></button></div><div class="avatarNote">到達景點時，會看到清晰的全身人物活動動畫。</div><button class="primary" id="startBtn">開始進階冒險</button></div></div><div id="complete"><div class="card"><h1>🏆 任務全部完成</h1><p id="completeText"></p><button class="primary" id="restartBtn">重新挑戰</button></div></div><div id="trapModal"><div class="resultCard"><div class="trapIcon">🕳️</div><h2>跌入陷阱！</h2><p>今次路線失敗，請避開紅色陷阱再試一次。</p><button class="primary" id="retryLevelBtn">再來一次</button></div></div><div id="routeResult"><div class="resultCard"><h2>🏁 過關成功</h2><div class="routeInfo" id="routeSummary">最短路線</div><div class="routeSteps" id="routeSteps"></div><button class="primary" id="nextLevelBtn">下一關</button></div></div><div id="landmarkArrival"><div class="arrivalCard"><div class="arrivalGlow"></div><div class="arrivalStars"><i style="left:12%;top:16%">✨</i><i style="right:13%;top:22%;animation-delay:.18s">⭐</i><i style="left:20%;bottom:22%;animation-delay:.35s">✨</i><i style="right:18%;bottom:26%;animation-delay:.5s">⭐</i></div><div class="arrivalIcon" id="arrivalIcon">🏫</div><div class="arrivalPlayer" id="arrivalPlayer">🧍</div><div class="arrivalScene" id="arrivalScene"></div><h2 id="arrivalTitle">到達學校！</h2><p id="arrivalAction">向小明同學借到一支筆</p></div></div><div id="transition"><div><h2 id="transitionTitle">任務完成！</h2><p id="transitionSub">準備進入下一張棋盤地圖⋯</p></div></div><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.160.0/build/three.min.js"></script><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pako@2.1.0/dist/pako.min.js"></script><script>(()=>{const d=s=>pako.ungzip(Uint8Array.from(atob(s),c=>c.charCodeAt(0)),{to:"string"});document.getElementById("appStyle").textContent=d(""
